name: Vector Legal
long_description:
A modern solution for Startup legal: Vector Legal is a hybrid AI law firm + legal tech platform. Our customers benefit from state of the art software for their legal operations + an experienced lawyer-in-the-loop. 

Services: fundraise & priced rounds | customer contracts | team growth & equity | AI draft & review | agentic data room | e-signatures | contract intelligence | legal health checks | mergers & acquisitions | co-founder separations | company formation.
one_liner: AI Law Firm + Legal Tech Platform for Startups
